name: Bug
description: Something is broken or behaving incorrectly

name: Critical
description: Blocking field use or data loss risk

name: High
description: High severity or impact

name: Medium
description: Medium severity or impact

name: Low
description: Low severity or impact

name: Offline Sync
description: Issues relating to offline data capture and background sync when connectivity resumes

name: Species ID
description: Species identification flow, database lookup, and coral/fish taxonomy features

name: Photo Upload
description: Photo capture, compression, upload, and gallery features

name: Survey Form
description: Survey form layout, validation, field logic, and submission

name: Map View
description: Map of monitoring sites, GPS pins, and spatial data display

name: Data Entry
description: Volunteer data entry flows and input field UX

name: Volunteer UX
description: Usability and accessibility issues specific to volunteer field users

name: Bleaching Alert
description: Features and fixes related to coral bleaching event detection and alert notifications

name: DHW / SST
description: Sea surface temperature and degree heating week data integration and display

name: Coral ID
description: Coral genus and morphology identification tools within the monitoring app

name: Transect Data
description: Belt transect and point-intercept transect data collection and validation logic

name: Auth
description: Login, session management, volunteer account registration and permission scopes

name: NOAA Integration
description: Data feeds, API calls, and format handling for NOAA PIFSC data sources

name: Push Notifications
description: In-app and push notification delivery for bleaching alerts and dive event reminders

name: Export
description: Data export features including CSV, GeoJSON, and PDF report generation
